title: Victory Is Ours
original_title: 港の乾杯　勝利をわが手に
overview: A sailor tries to help his younger brother, a horse-racing jockey, escape from the yakuza after double crossing them in a fixing scam. Seijun Suzuki's directorial debut.

trailers.title: Minato no kanpai: Shôri o waga te ni (1956)

en.title: Minato no kanpai: Shôri o waga te ni (1956)
